commands.narrative:
**Roster:** No changes since yesterday. 138 strategies (132 enabled, 6 disabled). All 6 action items from 2026-06-02 remain PROPOSED — no operator action taken in 24h. The URGENT live kill of v44-climb-1s-ttp10-live-micro is now 2 days pending and bleeding SOL daily.

**Headline:** 5 bot-excl+climbing variants now pass all 4 promotion gates — the backlog of unpromoted shadow strategies is the highest-priority decision this cycle. v25-bot-excl-climbing (n=530, +6.72 SOL total, +4.40 SOL drop_top3, +10.14 SOL/mo) leads a cluster of promotable strategies. v32-bot-excl-climbing-1s (n=354, drop_top3=+1.14, monthly=+8.15), v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp (n=393, drop_top3=+0.54, monthly=+8.00), v33-bot-excl-climbing-ttp5 (n=357, drop_top3=+0.52, monthly=+7.49), and v34-bot-excl-climbing-minlift (n=361, drop_top3=+0.26, monthly=+8.55) all clear the bar. This is a genuine cluster of promotable strategies, not a single outlier.

**Today's trading:** No trades today (n_graduations=0 at report time, pipeline briefly quiet — diagnose HEALTHY, all Levels 1–4 pass). Yesterday produced 1182 trades across 166 graduations. A `graduation_rate_drop` anomaly (high severity) is flagged: projected today=0 vs 7-day median of 185. This appears to be a brief quiet period rather than a structural failure — the bot processed shadow trades 640s ago.

**Edge-decay data gap:** edge-decay.json returned 0 entries today — the edge-decay computation has a data gap. The DECAYING flag that held back v25 promotion yesterday (ai-2026-06-02-006) cannot be confirmed or denied from this session. With n=530 and drop_top3=+4.40 SOL (65% of total P&L survives stripping the top 3 wins), the edge for v25 is very robust by the primary outlier check. Recommend operator investigate the edge-decay.json gap; if DECAYING is unconfirmed, recommend clearing the hold and promoting v25.

**20 phantom edge_decay anomalies** (medium severity) were generated with empty strategy_id and empty notes — this is a bug in the anomaly generator, not real signals. Recommend fixing the anomaly generation code.

**Kill backlog growing:** 35+ INVALID strategies remain enabled (all action items from 2026-06-02 still PROPOSED). This cycle adds 2 newly INVALID strategies: v37-creator-clean (n=101, total=-2.10, drop_top3=-3.05) and v40-vel-band (n=103, total=-1.12, drop_top3=-2.75) have now crossed n=100 with negative drop_top3. Recommend killing alongside the existing backlog.

**New signal — gini concentration:** `gini < 0.4 + climbing_t30_t45` is the #4 combo in best-combos (n=356, opt_avg_ret=+19.08% at TP150/SL30, STABLE in panel11 for gini-related combos). The gini < 0.4 filter selects very low token concentration — a dimension not yet in shadow test. Recommend creating a new shadow strategy to test this combo.

**v9shadow-velmono-dev watch:** n=83 shadow, total=+4.84, drop_top3=+3.10, monthly=+4.45. Excellent trajectory — drop_top3 is 64% of total (very robust). Expected to reach n=100 within ~5 days. Recommend continue watching.

**Operator priority (single most important action):** Kill v44-climb-1s-ttp10-live-micro NOW — it is a live strategy with n=114, total=-0.262 SOL, drop_top3=-0.507 SOL (INVALID by all metrics). Every additional day costs SOL. After that, execute the 5 kill-list action items from yesterday to clean up 35+ INVALID strategies, then promote v25 and v32.

anomalies.detail: No graduations in 700s at report time. Projected today=0 vs 7-day median=185. Bot is otherwise healthy (shadow trade 640s ago). Likely a brief quiet period.
20 edge_decay anomalies generated with empty strategy_id and notes — anomaly generator bug. edge-decay.json has 0 entries. Investigate the edge-decay computation pipeline.
v44-climb-1s-ttp10-live-micro running live with n=114, drop_top3=-0.507 SOL (INVALID). Kill action item PROPOSED for 2 days without execution.
35+ INVALID shadow strategies still enabled after 2 days of PROPOSED kill action items. 2 more crossed n=100 this cycle (v37-creator-clean, v40-vel-band).

patterns: bot-excl+climbing family dominates all rankings: v25/v32/v28/v33/v34 all pass the 4-gate bar, with v25 at +6.7 SOL total. This convergence on a single strategy family suggests the core signal (bot_excluded + momentum climbing at T+30→45) is the primary alpha source.

v9shadow-velmono-dev trending toward bar: n=83, expected 100 within ~5 days. drop_top3=+3.10 (64% of total) is remarkably robust — this strategy earns across the trade distribution, not from 1-3 outliers.
gini < 0.4 concentration signal emerging: #4 in best-combos at opt_avg_ret=+19.08% (n=356). Combined with climbing_t30_t45, this is the highest-opt_avg_ret untested combo. Worth shadowing.
Kill backlog unchanged for 2nd day: all 6 action items from 2026-06-02 still PROPOSED. INVALID strategies accumulate losses and consume monitoring bandwidth.
edge-decay.json data gap (0 entries today) may be a computation bug — 20 phantom edge_decay anomalies with empty notes support this hypothesis.

promote.reason: n=530, total=+6.715 SOL, drop_top3=+4.402 SOL, monthly=+10.14 SOL/mo — all 4 gates clear with substantial margin. edge-decay.json empty today (data gap); recommend clearing the hold from ai-2026-06-02-006 if DECAYING unconfirmed, then promote to live at reduced size.
n=354, total=+3.454 SOL, drop_top3=+1.141 SOL, monthly=+8.15 SOL/mo — all 4 gates clear. 1s-poll variant of v25 with cleanly positive drop_top3. Recommend promoting to shadow-live or live-micro.

kill.reason: URGENT LIVE — n=114, total=-0.262 SOL, drop_top3=-0.507 SOL, monthly=-1.12 SOL/mo. INVALID by all gates. Active daily SOL drain. 2nd day this item is PROPOSED without execution.
NEW INVALID — n=101, total=-2.104 SOL, drop_top3=-3.047 SOL, monthly=-7.71 SOL/mo. Crossed n=100 threshold and fails all gates.
NEW INVALID — n=103, total=-1.123 SOL, drop_top3=-2.750 SOL, monthly=-4.81 SOL/mo. Crossed n=100 threshold and fails all gates.

create_new.hypothesis: gini < 0.4 + climbing_t30_t45 is the #4 combo in best-combos (n=356, opt_avg_ret=+19.08% at TP150/SL30). The gini < 0.4 filter selects very low token concentration — a new dimension not yet shadow-tested. Target accumulating >= 0.5 SOL with drop_top3 > 0 on n=100+.

watch.reason: n=83 shadow (WATCH from ai-2026-06-02-005 continuing). total=+4.84 SOL, drop_top3=+3.10 SOL, monthly=+4.45 SOL/mo — excellent trajectory. Expected to cross n=100 within ~5 days.
n=167, total=+2.125 SOL, drop_top3=+0.359 SOL, monthly=+9.11 SOL/mo — passes all 4 gates. Marginal drop_top3. Watch for further accumulation before promoting alongside v25/v32.
n=393, total=+3.910 SOL, drop_top3=+0.543 SOL, monthly=+8.00 SOL/mo — passes all 4 gates. Trailing TP variant. Monitor alongside v32 for promotion decision.

action_items.summary: Kill 2 newly INVALID strategies: v37-creator-clean (n=101, drop_top3=-3.05 SOL) and v40-vel-band (n=103, drop_top3=-2.75 SOL). Both crossed n=100 this cycle with negative outlier-stripped P&L.

edge-decay.json returned 0 entries — computation gap. Investigate why the edge-decay file is empty. Once resolved: if v25-bot-excl-climbing is NOT confirmed DECAYING, clear hold from ai-2026-06-02-006 and promote v25 to live.
Promote v32-bot-excl-climbing-1s to live — n=354, total=+3.454 SOL, drop_top3=+1.141 SOL, monthly=+8.15 SOL/mo. All 4 gates clear with strong drop_top3 margin.
Create shadow strategy v50-gini04-climbing: gini < 0.4 + climbing_t30_t45 at TP150/SL30. #4 combo in best-combos (n=356, opt_avg_ret=+19.08%). New concentration dimension not yet in shadow test.
